description_en: Monthly exports, imports, total trade, and trade balance statistics for Malaysia.
description_ms: Statistik eksport, import, jumlah perdagangan, dan imbangan dagangan bulanan Malaysia.
methodology_en: This dataset presents headline monthly trade data for Malaysia, comprising total exports, domestic exports, re-exports, total imports, retained imports, total trade, and trade balance. Users should note that this data only covers the trade in goods; data on trade in services is published on a quarterly frequency as part of the balance of payments publication. For a full description of the methodology, please refer to the [Technical Notes](https://open.dosm.gov.my/publications/technical-notes/trade-technotes).
methodology_ms: Set data ini memaparkan data perdagangan bulanan Malaysia, merangkumi jumlah eksport, eksport domestik, re-eksport, jumlah import, import tertahan, jumlah perdagangan, dan imbangan dagangan. Pengguna perlu ambil perhatian bahawa data ini hanya meliputi perdagangan barangan; data perdagangan perkhidmatan diterbitkan pada frekuensi suku tahunan bersama penerbitan imbangan pembayaran. Untuk mendapat perincian metodologi yang penuh, sila merujuk kepada [Nota Teknikal](https://open.dosm.gov.my/ms-MY/publications/technical-notes/trade-technotes).
caveat_en: Data for the most recent two months is provisional and subject to revision in future updates.
caveat_ms: Data bagi dua bulan terkini tertakluk kepada semakan semula dalam kemaskini akan datang.
publication_en: [External Trade, Mar 2026](https://open.dosm.gov.my/publications/trade_2026-03), the latest edition of the monthly trade statistics published by DOSM. OpenDOSM also features a [dashboard on trade](https://open.dosm.gov.my/dashboard/external-trade).
publication_ms: [Perdagangan Luar, Mac 2026](https://open.dosm.gov.my/ms-MY/publications/trade_2026-03), edisi terkini bagi statistik perdagangan bulanan yang diterbitkan oleh DOSM. OpenDOSM sendiri juga memaparkan [papan pemuka khas tentang perdagangan](https://open.dosm.gov.my/ms-MY/dashboard/external-trade).

fields.name: series
fields.description_en: [Categorical] Either absolute values ('abs'), year-on-year growth ('growth_yoy') or month-on-month growth ('growth_mom')
fields.description_ms: [Kategori] Sama ada nilai mutlak ('abs'), pertumbuhan tahunan ('growth_yoy') atau pertumbuhan bulanan ('growth_mom')

fields.name: date
fields.description_en: [Date] The date in YYYY-MM-DD format, with DD set to 01 since the data is at monthly frequency
fields.description_ms: [Tarikh] Tarikh dalam format YYYY-MM-DD, dengan DD ditetapkan sebagai 01 kerana data berfrekuensi bulanan

fields.name: exports_domestic
fields.description_en: [Float, RM] Domestic exports, i.e. exports less re-exports.
fields.description_ms: [Apung, RM] Eksport domestik, iaitu eksport tolak re-eksport.

fields.name: re_exports
fields.description_en: [Float, RM] Re-exports, i.e. goods imported and subsequently exported without substantial transformation.
fields.description_ms: [Apung, RM] Re-eksport, iaitu barangan yang diimport dan seterusnya dieksport semula tanpa pengubahan ketara.

fields.name: imports_retained
fields.description_en: [Float, RM] Retained imports, i.e. imports less re-exports.
fields.description_ms: [Apung, RM] Import tertangguh, iaitu import tolak re-eksport.

fields.name: total
fields.description_en: [Float, RM] Total trade, i.e. exports plus imports.
fields.description_ms: [Apung, RM] Jumlah perdagangan, iaitu eksport tambah import.

fields.name: balance
fields.description_en: [Float, RM] Trade balance, i.e. exports less imports.
fields.description_ms: [Apung, RM] Imbangan dagangan, iaitu eksport tolak import.
